senses.gloss: tan, tanbark, tanning liquor, that wherewith one tans

examples.text: دباغ الصنوبر هو قشرة الذي يدبغ به ويقال بالعجمية رسكة.
examples.english: Tanbark of pine is the rind of it wherewith one tans, called in Romance rusca.

etymology.text: Occupational noun from the root د ب غ (d b ḡ).
